metadata.name: Follow Up on Test Drive No-Show

description: A customer who scheduled a test drive did not show up. A salesperson needs to follow up.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer who missed their test drive appointment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the customer and the vehicle they were scheduled to drive.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer to see if they are still interested and would like to reschedule.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes a polite follow-up call.

nodes.task_description: If the customer is interested, find a new time and reschedule the test drive.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully reschedules the appointment for a new time.
